scripts.cf:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.cf:deploy:direct: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=sop-knowledge-hub
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply sop-knowledge-hub-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply sop-knowledge-hub-db --remote
scripts.db:tables:local: npx wrangler d1 execute sop-knowledge-hub-db --local --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_schema WHERE type IN ('table','view') ORDER BY name;"
scripts.db:tables:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute sop-knowledge-hub-db --remote --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_schema WHERE type IN ('table','view') ORDER BY name;"
scripts.media:bucket:create: npx wrangler r2 bucket create sop-knowledge-hub-media
scripts.cf:functions:build: npx wrangler pages functions build functions --outdir .wrangler-functions-check
